author: Shem M.
pros: I think the setup process to get Jamf Protect implemented is a big pro. Being able to work with a dedicated team to get everything implemented really avoided any stress that could have been caused by a bad setup.
cons: I do not have any complaints with the Jamf Protect software as of now. I think that there could be more in the sense of Training for the product since Jamf only offers two training classes currently for the product.

review_title: Jamf Protect enabled seamless macOS security
description: Jamf Protect has enabled us to take a largely hands-off approach with security on macOS, safe in the knowledge that our fleet will be secured against any zero day attacks as quickly as possible. It's given us a huge amount of insight into the security settings and baselines we need to implement across the board, and has been extremely handy in attaining accreditation such as Cyber Secutity Essentials.
author: Emmanuel B.
pros: Jamf Protect has been helping us react to cyber incidents on macOS for the last few years, and stopping nefarious behaviour across the fleet. It is simple to set up and deploy, and gives a wealth of information for any cyber team to act on.
cons: The sheer amount of information on device settings and security frameworks can be a little bit overwhelming at first! However Jamf have done a good job in grouping all of it together and breaking it down by functional areas, so this is handy overall.

review_title: Good product, but still needs improvement.
description: Hoping for the best and overall improvement from Wandera. Fingers crossed.
author: Vladislav S.
pros: It allows us to save the budget and avoid unnecessary payment for overpriced data abroad for our colleagues.
cons: Since we are still migrating from Wandera, can't yet tell.

description: From purchasing, to deployment, and jamf support, our experience has been great!
author: Matt G.
pros: Like by review title says, I am still learning. There is so much to comprehend in Pro let alone, another integrated product. With that said, the integration is amazing. I love the ease of deployment.
cons: I would love more help on the "clean up" side for when viruses/malware are found. Protect has already caught some issues, some of which are easy to handle and others I'm at a complete loss and just wipe the device. The pricing for education could use some love. We are paying a premium, which I understand; however, I will be honest that competitors (Mosyle) are tempting for education customers such as ourselves. We love jamf to the core though, so the swap cannot be justified currently.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

author: Chad K.
pros: It is very customizable, and the online community is second to none.
cons: There have been a few features that have been missing for a long time. For example, renaming a device using user info during deployment.

description: Another great product that comes from building on top of our existing Jamf pro server that does help eliminate threats
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: It's ease of use with our current Jamf pro server, and the interface is similar so that lends to it.
cons: Some of the alerts I noticed are difficult to parse meaning, & lack of explanation.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

description: Symantec's M1 and macOS compatibility came into play with our decision to move to Jamf Protect. The transition was seamless and and well welcomed.
author: Philip C.
pros: The setup, deployment and all of its features are easily what I love most about Jamf Protect. Within minutes of approval, we were up and running.
cons: For our immediate purposes, we did not have any cons about using Jamf Protect. Jamf made everything easy and nothing hard or bad about using or deploying this software.

description: Jamf Pro, has the scalability to support organizations of different sizes and growth stages. It provides automation capabilities that enable IT administrators to streamline repetitive tasks, such as device provisioning and configuration. This reduces manual effort, minimizes errors, and allows IT teams to focus on more strategic initiatives
author: Verified Reviewer
pros: Conditional access controls: Zero-trust security emphasizes verifying every user and device trying to access resources before granting access
cons: Device compliance and security policies.

author: Daniel L.
pros: I can pull reports immediately, get instant notifications and have needed information whenever I want/need it
cons: Support is very limited, almost non-existent

author: Verified Reviewer
pros: I like how easy it is to implement. Jamf Connect too a bit of time to implement, but it's perfect.
cons: Problems navigating some menus. Sometimes it seems to be problematic.

review_title: My simple thoughts on Jamf Protect
description: Jamf Protect let us use Mac first protection tool which is un-invasive to the users. This allows the user experience be more friendly which sets it apart from our other desktop computers protection software
author: Tony P.
pros: How easy it was to setup and deploy a configuration to my Macs and the
cons: Changing plans was a little confusing for me at first. Once I figured them out it was very easy to make changes if you needed to.

review_title: So happy to be using Protect and out of the old software
description: Start to finish deploying this product was smooth. Support was great answering my questions.
author: Brian C.
pros: Integrates with Jamf seamlessly. Easy to deploy through Jamf. Easy to edit through Jamf.
cons: There was a little confusion in the beginning getting the trial to work and test operational but Jamf support got us through it.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: my experience is very good and the information one the software is grade A+.
author: xavier V.
pros: the protection the software offers to apple devices and the integration offered with the Jamf Pro.
cons: the price is mostly the hardest thing when gathering approvals from company and health care leadership.
author_duration: Used the software for: I used a free trial

author: Shannon P.
pros: Its very easy to integrate into Jamf pro to allow for simply but very effective remediation workflows
cons: It was a bit hard to get completely setup but once that was completed it off to the races.

review_title: Jamf Protect, why would you not?
author: Adam B.
pros: For a long time macOS security operations at an enterprise level was unheard of when it came to user friendly GUI and accurate reporting. Jamf Protect now makes this easy. We're now able to get a full spectrum of compliances on our macOS devices in one console, giving us the ability to be proactive in remediation when it comes to threat protection. We're given real-time alerts and insights that we were usually left in the dark with in the past.
cons: I honestly don't think there are any cons to this product. It does exactly what we want it to do and even rivals our current Threat Protection solution for Windows. The other products could definitely take some queues from Jamf Protect.

review_title: When SCEP went away for Macs, this was the best product I've found/tested/implemented...
description: Team has reached out, and I haven't had any Malware or Viruses on the Macs, so that's important.
author: Jerry S.
pros: Deployable with ARD or JAMF Pro. They made it a way easier alternative to other brands and the support has been great. They have contacted me, for feedback/improvements/ideas.
cons: Still learning....hoping for more free web trainings/videos like I had for JAMF Pro inception and deployment.

review_title: JAMF Protect the best for Macs
description: Really nice. Once I got it installed and tied into Jamf Pro, It's been great!
author: Jeff C.
pros: Auto install and auto updates configuration/version changes
cons: Needs a more simple way to setup advanced threat removals within Protect with auto quarantine file removal choices. minimize the need do dump issues out to Jamf Pro for resolution.

description: My experience so far has been great. The upkeep is very easy.
author: Cassandra A.
pros: Deployment could not have been easier! I have to wear many hats where I work. The setup and deployment was very simple and I stepped through everything using the documentation. It was so quick and simple I thought for sure I missed something. I didn't, it's just that simple.
cons: I have no been using Jamf Protect long enough to have any feature requests or complaints.

description: During the log4j crisis, Jamf Protect was extremely useful. JP was able to detect all the computers that had log4j files, so that we could mitigate those computers.
author: Derek B.
pros: I liked the implementation, it was very easy. Basically Jamf has it all set up right "out-of-box".
cons: The Threats can be hard to create at times, but Jamf Support is very good at helping create them. Often times they will update the threats themselves.

author: Richard H.
pros: Ease of deployment and extra protection.
cons: Nothing I can think of at this time. It works and integrates very well with Jamf Pro.

author: Paul A.
pros: I like the direct integration with JAMF pro. The system is very great to allow me insight in to the individual users
cons: Remediation is a little difficult and nothing is built in.

review_title: Jamf PRotect is the protection you need.
description: I really enjoy this product. We want to work in a very secure area where we can pass seistive contect to other without fear of outside intervention.
author: Victor B.
pros: I really enjoy the layout of this product, to me its not too crowded and is easy to follow.
cons: I dont have any cons for this software, just that it has to be a different site from the jamf pro!

description: Jamf makes it easy to keep an eye on your devices and help educators cut the distraction with kids on electronics.
author: Scott G.
pros: This software updates automatically so you don't have to worry about new viruses showing up.
cons: There are no weaknesses that I know if at this point.

review_title: Comprehensive endpoint security suite for macOS
author: Cory J.
pros: Designed exclusively, for macOS which can be easily seen in its architecture and implementation for any macOS Admin. It is feature rich and is one of the few solutions to leverage the new Endpoint Security framework to prevent (at process level) threats from even launching. Lightweight and by far the lowest impact of other solutions tested and used. Support is excellent and product is updated several time a month with new features and improvements based on feedback.
cons: More documentation, examples and better marketing and comparison against other solutions would be useful. With its newer approach for security, large range of features and design exclusively for macOS and Endpoint Security framework, traditional security professionals often miss and don't see the benefits of Protect from a preventative (vs. reactive) approach.
author_duration: Used the software for: Less than 6 months

description: Jamf Protect lets me worry less about what is going on in my environment!
author: Robert S.
pros: Protect is so easy to use and maintain, it gives valuable insight to the administrator!
cons: Initial configuration is a bit complicated, but deployment is super easy!
